message:
Test: add git hash normalization to snapshot output

The version output snapshot test was failing after every commit because
the version string includes the current git commit hash, e.g.,
"br version 0.1.0 (dev) (main@a6f128a)".

Added a regex normalization in normalize_output() to replace git hashes
with a stable placeholder:
- Pattern: \(main@[a-f0-9]+\)
- Replacement: (main@GIT_HASH)

This allows the version_output snapshot to remain stable across commits
while still verifying the format structure is correct.

The normalization is applied alongside existing patterns for:
- Timestamps (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS)
- Dates (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Issue IDs (ID-REDACTED)
- Log line numbers (removed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
